WinneroftheWarwickAwardforTeachingExcellence(SocialSciencesFacultyAward),inrecognition of an outstanding contribution to teaching and student support. The Social Sciences Faculty Award recognises the achievements of Warwick’s outstanding educators who have enabled excellent learning, creatingtheconditionswithinwhichallstudentsaresupportedandempoweredtosucceedandthrive.

Awarded the Fellowship of the Higher Education Academy Academic during the 2023-2024 academic year upon completion of the Professional Pathway for Experienced Staff (APP EXP). This program, recognised by the Higher Education Academy, assists experienced staff in aligning with the UK’s ProfessionalStandardsFramework2023andindemonstratingtheirinvolvementinteachingandlearning supportinhighereducation.
